title: skopeo: add rootless support
body:
still it depends on some changes in containers/storage and containers/image that were not merged.

Opening the PR so we can start playing with it

comments.body: @giuseppe can you rerun `make vendor` and add the changes?
Non-blocking: an integration test would be nice.

LGTM (needs eventual re-vendoring to c/image master).

Do you plan to work on an integration test, or should we merge https://github.com/containers/image/pull/613 + this now?
@mtrmac let me check how easy it is.  The main difficulty is that the test needs to run with uid!=0, so we need to setup the environment for the user

I forgot we cannot use user namespaces on the Travis kernel, the kernel there is too old:

```Error: error running newgidmap: exit status 1: newgidmap: write to gid_map failed: Operation not permitted```
@giuseppe Please rebase on top of `master`, and re-vendor from the c/image `master` branch now that https://github.com/containers/image/pull/613 was merged.
